story.text: Foreign proposal: a coordinator plus scout/builder/reviewer/repairer fleet acting on shared repo/queue/tests/logs/acceptance-gate under fleet rules (bounded authority, shared state, visible receipts, no second truth).

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'program-as-prompt' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.program-as-prompt-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
